steps.t: The market stalls of potential vendors have been set up in Trestlebridge. You should inspect the produce of the farmers.
The market stalls of potential vendors have been set up in Trestlebridge. You should inspect the produce of the farmers.
The market stalls of potential vendors have been set up in Trestlebridge. You should talk to the farmer closest to the stall with the rancid fruit.
The owner of the poisonous fruit ran out of town and towards the Wildwood. You should follow in pursuit and try to catch up with this man.
The vendor can be found outside of Cotfast in the Wildwood. You should confront the vendor.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
Reconstruction work continues on Trestlebridge. You should survey the reconstruction of Trestlebridge.
Aran Greenwith can be found at Trestlebridge. You should talk to Aran Greenwith.
